heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 11435 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this part $85,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2017 through 2020.

Amendments2015—, amended section generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “For the purpose of carrying out this part, there are authorized to be appropriated $100,000,000 for fiscal year 2009 and such sums as may be necessary for each subsequent fiscal year.”Pub. L. 114–95, § 91062008— substituted “$100,000,000 for fiscal year 2009 and such sums as may be necessary for each subsequent fiscal year” for “$70,000,000 for fiscal year 2002 and such sums as may be necessary for each of fiscal years 2003 through 2007”.Pub. L. 110–289
